review_summary: The Production Readiness infrastructure is robustly implemented. Sentry integration, Upstash rate limiting, and Zod runtime validation provide a solid foundation for stability and security. Zero-any policy has been successfully enforced in all touched files. Minor suggestion: tighten platform enums in Zod schemas to eliminate remaining type casts.
ticket_goal: Implement Production Readiness infrastructure (Zod validation, Rate Limiting, Sentry Observability).
